verdict_rationale: F1+F2+F3+F6 all PASS. F4 PASS (live spawn attempted on ubu1). F5 PASS (per-host RCAs verbatim). Witness-not-captured on ubu1 due to hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa bugs on Linux/dash; ubu2/hetzner have no nexus tree synced (rsync daemon mirrors only to ubu1). MEMORY drill-remote-only honored — no HEXA_LOCAL/HEXA_ALLOW_LOCAL_FALLBACK/NO_CAP bypass proposed.

falsifiers.evidence: scripts/bin/hexa_remote (line 2: 'rsync + ssh wrapper to run hexa on a remote host (ubu1 default)'); env knobs HEXA_REMOTE_HOST, HEXA_REMOTE_BIN, HEXA_REMOTE_NO_SYNC; pick_preferred_host() function lines 39-58; tool/hexa_remote_sync.sh fswatch daemon mirrors to ubu1 only; tool/kick_dispatch.hexa main() lines 784-1037 — NOT the SSH dispatcher; dispatches via hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa locally

ssh BatchMode=yes ConnectTimeout=5 echo y rc=0 for ubu1, ubu2, hetzner, htz. NOTE: 'herz' unresolvable (typo in MEMORY note — actual ssh alias is 'htz'/'hetzner' = 157.180.8.154). hexa_remote internal probe also gates on /proc/pressure/memory PSI<80: ubu1 PSI=0.04-21.49 PASS; ubu2 PSI=81.75-95.60 SATURATED; hetzner PSI=89.01-95.65 SATURATED; htz PSI=89.16-92.53 SATURATED.

SID = 'kick-self-remote-1777247587-11f6c79b' minted by hexa run /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/hive_parent_sid.hexa --prefix kick-self-remote (helper at @origin design/kick/2026-04-27_bench-orchestrator-smoke-claude-codex_omega_cycle.json step_3 path_A). Prefix 'kick-self-remote' honestly advertises self-parenting + remote intent.

ubu1 actually invoked hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa with parent_sid='kick-self-remote-1777247587-11f6c79b'. Spawn began (hive port 19877 allocated, subagent process pid 732115 started). Failed with witness-not-captured after wall_time=52s.
verbatim per-host failure modes captured (do NOT collapse into generic 'unreachable').

Did NOT propose HEXA_ALLOW_LOCAL_FALLBACK / HEXA_LOCAL=1 / NO_CAP bypass on Mac side, even when ubu1 spawn failed. Note: hexa_remote sets HEXA_LOCAL=1 ON THE REMOTE HOST (line 1235, 1239, 1241) to prevent resolver re-routing on the remote — this is structural, not a Mac-side bypass; constraint preserved.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: Remote dispatch is via scripts/bin/hexa_remote (SSH wrapper) — NOT a knob on kick_dispatch.hexa. Setting HEXA_REMOTE_HOST=ubu1 + invoking the wrapper directly with HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_REROUTE=1 successfully ran kick_dispatch.hexa on ubu1 with a full noise envelope + sub-agent spawn attempt. Carry-forward (b) from 2026-04-26 fanout #6 closed in principle (real attempt on remote).

tool/hexa_remote_sync.sh keeps Dev/nexus/ in sync with HOST=${HEXA_REMOTE_HOST:-ubu} which resolves to ubu1 via ssh config. ubu2 and hetzner do NOT receive the sync — Dev/nexus/tool/kick_dispatch.hexa absent on both. This constrains live-spawn to ubu1-only until the sync daemon is parameterized for fan-out (or per-host on-demand rsync invocation pattern is added).

hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa fails verbatim on ubu1 (Ubuntu 24.04, /bin/sh = dash) with: (1) 'sh: 1: cannot create /tmp/hive-subagent-/home/aiden/core/hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa-19877-1777247752.log: Directory nonexistent' — log path embeds full source-file path with slashes; (2) 'Runtime error: undefined function: ai_err_exit'; (3) 'mkfifo: cannot create fifo /tmp/subagent-relay-/home/aiden/core/hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa-.fifo: No such file or directory'; (4) 'sh: 1: disown: not found' — dash lacks disown. Bugs are independent of MEMORY drill-remote-only constraint and block witness landing on remote.

ubu2/hetzner/htz all consistently above PSI=80 ceiling during the probe window — hexa_remote rejects with 'PSI avg10=NN.NN > 80 (R5.4 ω-hexa-5 src=default80) — skipping saturated host'. This is honest external admission control, but during heavy-load periods the active fanout pool collapses to ubu1 only. Carry-forward: investigate per-host PSI threshold tuning OR scheduling kick(ω-cycle) at off-peak hours.

carry_forward: Patch hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa on Linux: (a) sanitize log/fifo path components — slashes from script path leak into /tmp paths; (b) implement ai_err_exit OR remove the call sites; (c) replace 'disown' with portable POSIX equivalent (e.g. nohup in subshell with exit) for dash compatibility.
Extend tool/hexa_remote_sync.sh fan-out beyond HOST=ubu — accept HEXA_REMOTE_SYNC_HOSTS=ubu1,ubu2,hetzner CSV and rsync to each, so kick(ω-cycle) live-spawn smoke can target any of the 3 hosts.

Re-evaluate PSI thresholds per-host (HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD_HETZNER=95 etc.) — current default80 collapses fanout to ubu1 only during peak periods. May reflect actual saturation but bench needs at least 2 hosts for cross-host comparison.
Update MEMORY note: 'herz' → 'htz' (or 'hetzner') for ssh-config-canonical hostname. Today's probe found 'herz' unresolvable.
MEMORY 'htz drill 경로·바이너리·디스크 제약: /root full': today's probe shows 41% disk (38G/98G). Either situation has changed, OR the constraint refers to a specific dir not /root mountpoint.
